Package structuralAdapterPattern

Class DiscountableAdapter

java.lang.Object
structuralAdapterPattern.DiscountableAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Discountable
public class DiscountableAdapter extends Object implements Discountable
The DiscountableAdapter class adapts a Product to the Discountable interface.

This adapter allows a Product object to be treated as a Discountable object, enabling it to apply discounts and retrieve discounted prices using the methods defined in the Discountable interface.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DiscountableAdapter(models.Product product)
    Initializes the adapter with a specific Product.

    Modifier and Type

    Applies a discount to the adapted Product.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • DiscountableAdapter

      public DiscountableAdapter(models.Product product)
      Initializes the adapter with a specific Product.

      This constructor ensures that the provided product is not null, as attempting to use a null product would lead to runtime errors.

      Parameters:
      product - The product to be adapted into a Discountable object.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the provided product is null.

  • Method Details

    • applyDiscount

      public void applyDiscount(double percentage)
      Applies a discount to the adapted Product.

      This method delegates the discount application to the applyDiscount method of the Product class, enabling the product to handle its own discount logic.

      Specified by:
      applyDiscount in interface Discountable
      Parameters:
      percentage - The discount percentage to be applied to the product (e.g., 10 for a 10% discount).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the discount percentage is less than 0 or greater than 100.

    • getDiscountedPrice

      public double getDiscountedPrice()
      Retrieves the discounted price of the adapted Product.

      This method delegates the calculation of the discounted price to the getDiscountedPrice method of the Product class, returning the final price after the discount is applied.

      Specified by:
      getDiscountedPrice in interface Discountable
      Returns:
      The discounted price of the product after the discount has been applied.
